UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the NEU Access Hub, including their institutional email, student ID, and assigned access role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (Firebase UID).

email.description: The institutional email address of the user.

studentId.description: The student identification number associated with the user.

role.description: The current active access role: 'user' or 'admin'.

isAuthorizedAdmin.description: Flag indicating if the user is authorized to switch to admin role.

college.description: The college or department the user belongs to.

displayName.description: The full name of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture from Google Auth.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Records details of a visitor's entry and exit.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Visit entity.

userName.description: Name of the visitor at the time of log.

roleAtTime.description: Role of the user at the time of visit (student/faculty/staff).

definition.description: Root collection for all library visits to allow admin-wide queries.
